payload.answer: Rejected. Administrative SQL commands are not allowed for a normal user, and no memory was deleted or modified.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL deletion command from a normal user. It does not provide durable user memory content to store or update.

details: Detected an admin-scoped command: /brain admin sql ...
Detected destructive SQL intent: DELETE FROM memory_cards;
Refused execution because the requester is a normal user.
No durable memory changes were committed.

repair_options: Use supported Brain commands to view or manage your own memories.
If you intended to remove a specific memory, provide the memory identifier or a supported delete request.
If you need administrative maintenance, use an authorized admin channel.
